name: piper-morgan
description: Piper Morgan as a Claude Code / Claude Desktop plugin: bring your PM assistant into your own chat. Three layered skills over a local MCP server — meet-piper (a one-question-at-a-time interview that learns how YOU work as a PM; the profile is owned by the MCP server so setup works on every surface incl. Cowork), ask-piper (relay a question to your locally-running Piper Morgan), and consult-piper (when Piper lacks context, gather it from your GitHub and re-ask, with honest provenance). Requires a local Piper Morgan server (python main.py, :8001). Thin BYOC proof-of-concept.
